brief_to_build_fidelity.severity: CRITICAL — this is the #1 gap. The brief is decorative, not functional.

Second full rebuild produced all 5 — but required explicit 'rebuild with all 5 pages' command

results.request: Change the reunion date to August 15, 2026
results.expected: content_update → surgical replacement → no plan gate
results.actual: plan card → Claude asked clarification question instead of making edit
results.gap: Generic date change didn't match content_update regex patterns. Routed to layout_update → plan gate → conversational response

results.request: Update the PDF price from $24.99 to $19.99 on the our-story page
results.actual: PERFECT — Direct edit applied, no AI call, deterministic change

content_edits.summary: 1/2 content edits worked surgically. Price change with specific field name succeeded. Date change without field name failed.

structural_edit.request: Add a FAQ section to the home page
gaps: Plan card correctly appeared (expected for structural edit)
BUT plan targeted our-story.html (activePage) instead of index.html (requested page)
Claude detected the mismatch and asked for clarification instead of auto-switching pages
Page-aware routing missing — structural edits always go to activePage

stock_photo_fill.notes: Worked perfectly. Filled gallery-1970, gallery-1990, gallery-2010 slots via Unsplash. No plan gate. Correct classifier routing.

gaps: 'Run verification' misclassified as layout_update instead of verification intent
Generated a plan card with layout modifications instead of running the verification pipeline
Known gap from Playwright autonomous build test (2026-04-03)

deploy.notes: Worked perfectly. 'Deploy the site to staging' → immediate deploy → URL returned. No plan gate.

gaps: Not verified — would need to inspect generated CSS for :hover transforms

Content edits without explicit field names route to plan gate instead of content_update

Component library has no chat interface (import/export)

2. Widen content_update classifier to handle 'change the X to Y' without field names
3. Add page-switching logic before structural edits when user specifies a different page
4. Fix verification classifier to match 'run verification' pattern
